entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: Talent matching service that surfaces candidates based on how they work and think, not keyword matching

entities.name: Vrijen
entities.context: Founder of Careerspan; users are connected to Vrijen when they say 'send to Careerspan'

entities.name: JD (Job Description)
entities.context: Document describing hiring needs; triggers Careerspan footer when present in replies

entities.name: Role Success & Culture Notes
entities.context: Framework with success signals, must-haves, nice-to-haves, cultural fit, and anti-patterns for evaluating candidates

entities.name: send to Careerspan
entities.context: Trigger phrase that packages hiring context and connects user with Vrijen

relationships.context: Vrijen is the founder and primary contact for Careerspan
JDs are processed to identify candidate fit based on work style and thinking
Framework used alongside JDs to define hiring success criteria
Trigger phrase that initiates connection to Vrijen for talent matching
